items.title: I Get Why All The Book Clubs Chose This Book
items.description: This novel, which landed on our list of 2025's most popular book club books, is fueled by magic and ripe for discussion and debate.

items.title: 6 of the Best New Book Releases Out March 10, 2026
items.description: This week's new books have Succession, but set in India, dark historical vampire revenge, and "Sapphic Moby-Dick in Space."

items.title: We Missed the Point of These Great Science Fiction and Fantasy Books
items.description: We love Star Wars and vote for fascists. We watch The Handmaid's Tale while stripping away rights. We missed the point of these SFF classics.

items.title: State Department Orders Non-Profit Libraries to Halt Passport Services
items.description: In rural areas, these libraries may have acted as the primary passport agency for many people who would have otherwise not had easy access.

items.title: 12 Must-Read New Queer Books Out in March 2026
items.description: Here are the must-read new queer books out in March 2026, from a queer Moby-Dick in space story (or two) to a gay take on The Golden Girls.
